pulse: The consumer sector trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 15.5x and a median P/E of 27.3x, slightly above broader market valuations. Best Buy (BBY) reported disappointing holiday sales, which reflects broader consumer sentiment as spending has been flat, negatively impacting its revenue growth to -1%, despite maintaining a P/E of 22.2x. Moving forward, investors should be cautious in this environment, as the latest reports suggest consumer spending may continue to cool amid job market concerns, potentially leading to further pressure on earnings across the sector.
